reverseSearch.withUrlHint: Open this image in a reverse-search engine:
reverseSearch.noUrlHint: No image URL provided — these will open each engine so you can upload the file manually.

upload.title: Image Upload
upload.dropzonePrompt: Drag 'n' drop an image here, click to select a file, or paste (Ctrl+V)
upload.acceptedFormats: (JPEG, PNG, TIFF, WEBP, HEIC, BMP, GIF)

exif.empty: No EXIF data found in this image.

gps.empty: No GPS data found in this image.

welcome.title: Image Tools
welcome.intro1: Image Tools lets you inspect an image file for OSINT purposes. Upload a picture to see every piece of metadata it carries — camera/device info, capture timestamp, GPS location, and the software used to create or edit it.
welcome.intro2: You can also kick off a reverse image search without any API keys: provide the image's URL (if it has one) to get deep links straight into Google Lens, Yandex, Bing, and TinEye, or use the same buttons to open each engine for a manual upload.

exifGps.title: EXIF & GPS
exifGps.description: Full EXIF tag breakdown plus a map link when GPS data is present

fileProps.title: File Properties & Hashes
fileProps.description: Format, dimensions, color mode, DPI, and MD5/SHA1/SHA256 hashes

reverseSearch.title: Reverse Image Search
reverseSearch.description: Deep links into Google Lens, Yandex, Bing, and TinEye — no API keys required

privacy.title: Privacy-Friendly
privacy.description: Your image is only sent to this app's own backend, never to a third party
